testcase: AI_COMPUTE: OVER clause is required
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank', 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: Invalid function AI_COMPUTE

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: ORDER BY in OVER clause is not allowed
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank', 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category ORDER BY d.text) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: ORDER BY clause is not allowed

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: window frame in OVER clause is not allowed without ORDER BY
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank', 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: window frame is not allowed without ORDER BY

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: second argument must be a static object (non-static field reference)
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, d.category) OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: second value must be static object

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: second argument must be a static object (string literal is not an object)
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, 'not-an-object') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: second value must be static object

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: empty options object
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {}) OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: second argument (options) must not be empty

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: missing action field in options
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}) OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: 'action' field must be a string

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: invalid action value in options
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'bogus', 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}) OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: unsupported action

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: action field is not a string
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':123, 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}) OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: 'action' field must be a string

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: missing URI in options
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: 'uri' field is required

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: empty string URI in options
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank', 'uri':''}, 'test') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: 'uri' field is required

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: named parameter $cfg that is not an object is caught at runtime
_comment: Named parameters bypass the plan-time static-object check because op.Value() returns nil for runtime-resolved params. The type error is caught in setAiCompute.
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, $cfg) OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: second argument (options) must be an object

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: named parameter $cfg with unsupported action
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, $cfg) OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: unsupported action

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: named parameter $cfg with missing URI
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, $cfg, 'database technology') OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: 'uri' field is required

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: empty options with no PARTITION BY
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {}) OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: second argument (options) must not be empty

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: missing action with no PARTITION BY
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}) OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: 'action' field must be a string

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: missing URI with no PARTITION BY
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: 'uri' field is required

testcase: AI_RERANK: OVER clause is required
statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'test') AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'
error: Invalid function AI_RERANK

testcase: AI_RERANK: ORDER BY in OVER clause is not allowed
statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category ORDER BY d.text) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'
error: ORDER BY clause is not allowed

testcase: AI_RERANK: window frame without ORDER BY is not allowed
statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'
error: window frame is not allowed without ORDER BY

testcase: AI_RERANK: second argument must be a static object (non-static field reference)
statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, d.category, 'test') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'

statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, 'not-an-object', 'test') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'
error: second value must be static object

testcase: AI_RERANK: empty query string with PARTITION BY
statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, '') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'
error: AI_RERANK: third argument (query) must not be empty

testcase: AI_RERANK: empty query string with no PARTITION BY
statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, '') OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'
error: AI_RERANK: third argument (query) must not be empty

statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 123) OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'
error: AI_RERANK: third argument (query) must be a string

testcase: AI_RERANK: named parameter $cfg that is not an object is caught at runtime
_comment: Named parameters bypass the plan-time static-object check (Value() returns nil at plan time). The type error is caught in setAiRerank.
statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, $cfg, 'database technology') OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'
error: AI_RERANK: second argument (options) must be an object

testcase: AI_RERANK: named parameter $cfg missing URI field
statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, $cfg, 'database technology') OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'
error: AI_RERANK: 'uri' field is required

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: action rerank with missing query argument
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank', 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}) OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: action 'rerank' requires a query as the third argument

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: action rerank with empty query string
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank', 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, '') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: third argument (query) must not be empty

statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank', 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 123) OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: third argument (query) must be a string

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: named param action rerank with missing query argument
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, $cfg) OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: action 'rerank' requires a query as the third argument

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: named param action rerank with empty query string
statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, $cfg, '') OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'
error: AI_COMPUTE: third argument (query) must not be empty
